Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

CTN 4, 157 [Grave-building rituals with namburbu][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
o 1o 1

[...] a-na ŠA₃ KI.MAḪ iq-[...]1

(o 1) He [...] into the middle of the grave.

o 22

[...] x-ma ⸢LA?⸣ [...] x [...]

(o 2) [...] ... and ... [...] ... [...].

o 33

[...] LIŠ? ŠU KU TE DI [x] AR? a-na NA u₃ E₂-[šu₂]

(o 3) [...] ... [...] ... to the man and his house [...] ... is added.

o 44

[...] x GIŠ x-ḪI.A ur-te-ed-[de]

o 55

[...] udunita₂!(NA.)SISKUR LU₂ tug₂ŠA₃.⸢ḪA⸣

(o 5) [...] an offering. The man [...] a linen cloth [...] he keeps bringing across [...] and [...] ... with potash [...] he kills ....

o 66

[...] uš-ta-na-bal-kat₃-⸢ma⸣2

o 77

[...] x KU x x i-na NAGA.SI

o 88

[...] NIG₂ x NI GAZak

o 99

[...] UR₅.⸢GIM⸣ tu-šad-bab-ši

(o 9) You make [...] speak as follows to it (the brick mould).

o 1010

[...] x UŠ ⸢TA?⸣ AD bi-na-ta

(o 10) [...] ... limbs [...], brick mould, you are fixed.

o 1111

[... na-al]-⸢ba⸣-an-tu₂ kun-na-a-ti

o 1212

[...] x x GISKIM ḪULte

(o 12) [...] ... of the evil sign [...] may it (the evil) not draw near, may it not approach me, may it not reach me.

o 1313

[...] a!-a! ⸢DIM₄⸣ a-⸢a⸣ iq-ri-ba a-a KURan-ni3

o 1414

[...] KUR ki-[ma] ⸢qut⸣-ri li-tel-li a-na ANe

(o 14) [...] the mountain, like smoke may it keep going up to heaven.

o 1515

[... ZI]⸢ḫi⸣ [x KI]-⸢šu₂⸣ a-a i-tur

(o 15) [...] an uprooted [...] may it not return [...] its place.

o 1616

[...] x IGI RA u ⸢EME⸣ ina IZI tul₂-lal

(o 16) [...] ... and you purify the blade with fire.

o 1717

[...] ⸢ŠE⸣.GA LIŠ? U₄ Aʾ EZEN gišMAR gišMAR.ŠE.RAḪ

(o 17) [...] propitious [...] ... a spade and shovel.

o 1818

[... giš]ŠINIG gišIN.NU.UŠ gišGIŠIMMAR.TUR

(o 18) [...] tamarisk, a maštakal-plant, a palm-shoot, [...], gold, carnelian, lapis lazuli, hulālu-stone, red [...], cedar oil, good oil, cedar [...], cedar, [...].

o 1919

[... KU₃].⸢SI₂₂⸣ na₄GUG na₄ZA.GIN₃ na₄NIR₂

o 2020

[...] ⸢ḪUŠ?⸣ I₃ gišEREN.NA I₃ DU₁₀.GA

o 2121

[... giš]EREN? giše-re-na

o 2222

[...] ⸢giš⸣U₃.ŠUB tul₂-lal-šu

(o 22) You purify [...] the brick mould.

o 2323

[...] x x ina U₄ ŠE.GA gišMAR

(o 23) [...] ... on a propitious day the spade [...] you form the [...] and [...] ... and

o 2424

[...] ⸢ta-ba⸣-aš₂-šim-ma

o 2525

[...] ⸢MUŠ⸣-ma

(rest of obverse missing)
(start of reverse missing)
Reverse
r 1'r 1'

[...] ⸢i-kas₂⸣-[sip]

(r 1) He makes a funerary offering [...].

r 2'2'

[...] i-kas₂-sip

(r 2) He makes a funerary offering [...].

r 3'3'

[...] i-kas₂-sip

(r 3) He makes a funerary offering [...].

(rest of reverse blank)

1MAH omitted from handcopy (for further collations see the print edition by Ambos)

2lemmatisation as irregular form of nabalkutu is tentative

3Text ZA.ZA for A.A.
